summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Wealthwolffs Global Hedged Solutions website completed successfully. All backend APIs, frontend functionality, authentication flows, and admin panel features are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with logo, headline, Science text in monospace, subtext, and Enter Site button
Navigation from landing page to /home works correctly
Header navigation with About Us dropdown (Who are we, Why Wealthwolffs, Founder, Careers, Media)
Products dropdown shows WolffsInstaAlerts and WolffsInstaTrade
All main site sections present: Hero, Who Are We, Why Wealthwolffs, Founder, Careers, Media, Testimonials, Solutions, Contact
Solutions carousel with all 9 financial services and horizontal scrolling functionality
Testimonials section loads 3 testimonials from GET /api/testimonials
News/Media section loads 3 articles from GET /api/news
Contact form submission via POST /api/enquiries works with success message
Footer with all social media links (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Threads, YouTube)
Login/Sign Up button triggers Google OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
Admin panel properly protected - redirects to home when not authenticated
Admin dashboard accessible with admin session showing stats, users, enquiries management
Admin CRUD operations for news, testimonials, and hidden pages working
Backend API endpoints: GET /api/testimonials, GET /api/news, POST /api/enquiries all working
Auth endpoints properly protected returning 401 without authentication
Color scheme with white background, blue (#003B5C) and light brown (#C4A47C) properly implemented
